title: Golden heart pick
description: It's op gives you hearts when you right-click can mine stuff super fast
body: grants you 20 golden absorption hearts whenever you attack an entity with it. This enchanted pickaxe mines blocks incredibly fast and works effectively on all block types, making it perfect for quick excavation projects. You can also right-click with the pickaxe to instantly gain the golden hearts effect without needing to attack anything, and the absorption hearts last for 60 seconds each time you use it.
